data.body: review-bot debug (/rebar-debug): CONFIRMED via read-only probe + code reading that the bot was NOT dead — live webhook path healthy (voted.db written recently, 717/720/721/722 backfilled to +1); the ~25min stall was the reconcile backfill draining a backlog after the 22:53Z autodeploy restart dropped the in-memory queue. Two genuine defects fixed under RED->GREEN (change 726, tickets 89be+c130): (1) drain in-memory queue on lifespan shutdown + compose stop_grace_period + reconciler per-review timeout parity (reconcile had none -> a hung review could freeze all backfill); (2) configure_logging() so rebar _emit INFO events reach stdout/journald (uvicorn configured only its own loggers -> all voter_voted/reconcile_* silently dropped, the blindness that made a healthy reconciler look dead). Sibling found: opcert_service has the same logging gap (filed idea 047a). 61 tests green, lint+typecheck clean.
